subject: FW: Swedish-American Life Science Summit in Nordic Life Science Review
body:
From: behnbom@aol.com [mailto:behnbom@aol.com] 
Sent: Thursday, June 05, 2008 3:53 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fwd: Swedish-American Life Science Summit in Nordic Life Science Review

 

For Jeffrey Best from Stockholm!!BE


-----Original Message-----
From: Freja Langert-Gidén <freja@swedishamericanlifescience.com>
To: Freja Langert-Gidén <freja@swedishamericanlifescience.com>
Sent: Wed, 4 Jun 2008 5:27 pm
Subject: Swedish-American Life Science Summit in Nordic Life Science Review

Dear all,

As I assume and hope you have already noted in your calendars, the Swedish-American Life Science Summit will soon be held for the fourth annual year in Stockholm, on August 20th-22nd. Attached you will find a recent publication in the new magazine Nordic Life Science, featuring the grand success of SALSS 2007. Be sure to partake in this year’s sequel, which we are certain will maintain the same impressive standard as the previous three years.

Invitations will follow shortly. Do not hesitate to contact me with any inquiries you may have regarding the event. 

Best wishes and in hopes of seeing you in August!

Freja

Freja Langert-Gidén
Project Coordinator
Swedish-American Life Science Summit, SALSS
Tel: +46 (0)702 79 25 24
www.swedishamericanlifescience.com <http://www.swedishamericanlifescience.com/>  







________________________________

Stay informed, get connected and more with AOL on your phone <http://mobile.aol.com/productOverview.jsp?productOverview=aol-mobile-overview&?&ncid=aolmbd00030000000139> .
